channel.title: machine-learning on Rhyeu's blog
channel.description: Recent content in machine-learning on Rhyeu's blog

item.title: tidymodels in iris data
item.description: library(tidyverse) ## -- Attaching packages ------------------------------------------------------- tidyverse 1.3.0 -- ## √ ggplot2 3.3.2 √ purrr 0.3.4 ## √ tibble 3.0.3 √ dplyr 1.0.2 ## √ tidyr 1.1.2 √ stringr 1.4.0 ## √ readr 1.3.1 √ forcats 0.5.0 ## -- Conflicts ---------------------------------------------------------- tidyverse_conflicts() -- ## x dplyr::filter() masks stats::filter() ## x dplyr::lag() masks stats::lag() library(tidymodels) ## -- Attaching packages ------------------------------------------------------ tidymodels 0.1.1 -- ## √ broom 0.7.0 √ recipes 0.1.13 ##

item.title: xgboost in tidymodel
item.description: # install.packages(c("AmesHousing", "janitor", "dplyr", "rsample", "recipes", "parsnip", "tune", "dials", "workflows", "yardstick", "doParallel")) # data library(AmesHousing, quietly = T) # data cleaning library(janitor, quietly = T) ## ## 다음의 패키지를 부착합니다: 'janitor' ## The following objects are masked from 'package:stats': ## ## chisq.test, fisher.test # data prep library(dplyr, quietly = T) ## ## 다음의 패키지를 부
